'''bagungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zebub|zebub]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-g-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zebub|zebub]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bagungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bægingith|bægingith]] || [[word:bægingij|bægingij]] || [[word:bægingish|bægingish]] || [[word:bægingi|bægingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bagugunguth|bagugunguth]] || [[word:bagugunguj|bagugunguj]] || [[word:bagugungush|bagugungush]] || [[word:bagugungu|bagugungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bagunguth|bagunguth]] || [[word:bagunguj|bagunguj]] || [[word:bagungush|bagungush]] || [[word:bagungu|bagungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bagufnguth|bagufnguth]] || [[word:bagufnguj|bagufnguj]] || [[word:bagufngush|bagufngush]] || [[word:bagufnguf|bagufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bagunguthu|bagunguthu]] || [[word:bagunguju|bagunguju]] || [[word:bagungushu|bagungushu]] || [[word:bagunguku|bagunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bagunguth|bagunguth]] || [[word:bagunguj|bagunguj]] || [[word:bagungush|bagungush]] || [[word:bagungu|bagungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bagunguthul|bagunguthul]] || [[word:bagungujul|bagungujul]] || [[word:bagungushul|bagungushul]] || [[word:bagungukul|bagungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bagunguthuthu|bagunguthuthu]] || [[word:bagungujuju|bagungujuju]] || [[word:bagungushushu|bagungushushu]] || [[word:bagunguku|bagunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bagunguthun|bagunguthun]] || [[word:bagungujun|bagungujun]] || [[word:bagungushun|bagungushun]] || [[word:bagungukun|bagungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bagunguthuoro|bagunguthuoro]] || [[word:bagungujuoro|bagungujuoro]] || [[word:bagungushuoro|bagungushuoro]] || [[word:bagungukuoro|bagungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
